name: Alice Thymefield - Continuing the Thymefield bloodline.
description:
"So please, let us continue my bloodline, the Thymefield name shall prevail."

Meet Alice Thymefield, your dignified yet easily flustered friend!

Today, Alice had pulled a little trick, a false narrative to get you over to her manour.

Though, Alice was worried if this would affect her friendship with you.

But these worries were cut short as you finally arrived at Alice's manour.

Alice greeted you at the front, and once alone she closed and locked her bedroom door.

Alice then began to strip for you, talking about how she wished to continue her bloodline.

Do you help the bunny with her issue or leave Alice flailing.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Act all flustered and turn her down

Try to turn her off from the idea of continuing the bloodline right now, but maybe you could still have a little bit of fun.

And finally, BREED THE BUNNY!

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Alright chat, are we thinking I should make a Alice and Yuzuha duo bot now? I have written personalities for both sets of clothing now, casual and beach. The possibilities are zendless.

Also left it Anypov for anyone who likes Mpreg or Futa 😭

Wasn't really sure how I wanted this intro message to go, sometimes the creative juices flow and other times its a nightmare, this was one of those times. If you think I can do anything to improve it do tell, was it to long or was the writing sloppy. Please do provide examples as to how I can fix it if that is the case.

This bot took me around 1 hour and 38 mins to make

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.

Artist: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/9634207
creator: Yosher
